viewsWelcome.textSearchTree.contents:
No search results yet.

Run [Enhanced Search](command:smartReferences.searchText) to start searching.
config.textSearch.includeGlobs.descripti: Additional include glob rules for Enhanced Search. Empty means no extra restriction.
config.textSearch.excludeGlobs.descripti: Additional exclude glob rules for Enhanced Search. These are merged with VS Code search.exclude and files.exclude.
config.textSearch.fuzzySearch.descriptio: Enable fuzzy subsequence matching for Enhanced Search. Disabled by default.
config.textSearch.groupCodeAndComments.d: Group Enhanced Search results by code matches and comment matches.
config.textSearch.groupConfigAndCodeFile: Group Enhanced Search results by config files and code files.
config.textSearch.maxFuzzyFileScan.descr: Maximum number of files scanned in fuzzy search mode.
config.textSearch.maxFuzzyMatches.descri: Maximum number of matches collected in fuzzy search mode.
